description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt update -yqq and apt install -yqq --no-install-recommends libgtk-4-dev. Define two stages: lint and test. In the lint stage add a lint:clippy job that runs rustup component add clippy then cargo clippy -- --deny warnings, and a lint:fmt job that runs rustup component add rustfmt-preview in its before_script and then cargo fmt -- --check. In the test stage add a test:debug job that runs make MODE=debug test and a test:release job that runs make MODE=release test. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
